title: Emirates NBD bank waives ATM fees across UAE, GCC as war fears grow
summary_full: Emirates NBD is waiving ATM withdrawal fees across the UAE and GCC until March 31, 2026, to ease financial access amid regional disruptions. This move also includes free debit card replacements and delivery, offering crucial support to stranded travelers and residents navigating travel uncertainties. The initiative aims to ensure uninterrupted access to funds during a turbulent period.
